description: Compact Yet Powerful Cutting Tool This Small Hacksaw is a versatile and efficient cutting tool designed for a variety of materials. With a 6-inch (150mm) frame and 10 durable carbon steel blades, it’s perfect for cutting metal, plastic PVC pipes, and wood. Whether you're doing home repairs, DIY crafts, or workshop projects, this junior hacksaw delivers precision and control in every cut. Durable Carbon Steel Blades Equipped with 10 replacement blades made from high-quality carbon steel, this coping saw ensures longevity and consistent performance. The sharp-toothed edges glide smoothly through materials, providing a clean and accurate cut. Ideal for fine detail work and tougher materials alike. Ergonomic and User-Friendly Design The hacksaw features an ergonomic handle that offers a firm, comfortable grip, minimizing hand fatigue during extended use. Its lightweight and compact frame make it easy to maneuver in tight spaces, making it a practical addition to any toolbox—professional or amateur.
